title: habenaria ciliata
intro: Habenaria ciliata is a species of orchid native to India, characterized by its ciliate leaves and showy white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Habenaria ciliata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and its roots can be dried and used in powder or capsule form for medicinal purposes.
